data.title: Binance: Alpha Airdrop Today at 08:00 for Eligible Users with 225 Alpha Points
data.description: Binance announced on X that there will be a Binance Alpha airdrop today at 08:00 (UTC).Users with at least 225 Binance Alpha Points can claim the token on a first-come, first-served basis until the airdrop pool is fully distributed or the airdrop event expires. Further details will be announced soon.

data.title: Binance Alpha to Feature SnapX (XNAP), Common (COMMON), and Semantic Layer (42)
data.description: Binance announced on X that on October 27, 2025, Binance Alpha will be the first platform to feature SnapX (XNAP), Common (COMMON), and Semantic Layer (42) airdrops.Eligible users can claim their airdrops using Binance Alpha Points on the Alpha Events page once trading opens. Further details will be announced soon.

data.title: Binance to Update Collateral Ratios and Leverage Tiers for Portfolio Margin and Futures Contracts
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, significant updates are scheduled for the collateral ratios and tiered collateral ratios under Portfolio Margin and PM Pro. These changes will take effect on 2025-10-28 and 2025-10-31, impacting various assets. On 2025-10-28, assets such as ZEC, FIL, ALGO, A, RUNE, AR, LUNC, THETA, ICP, NEO, PNUT, SPK, CHZ, and NOT will see adjustments in their collateral ratios. For instance, ZEC's collateral ratio will increase from 20% to 30%, while FIL's will decrease from 70% to 50%. Similarly, ALGO's ratio will drop from 60% to 50%, and A's from 65% to 45%. Other assets like RUNE, AR, LUNC, THETA, ICP, NEO, PNUT, SPK, CHZ, and NOT will also experience reductions in their collateral ratios.

Further adjustments will occur on 2025-10-31, affecting assets under PM Pro. ZEC, RUNE, A, LUNC, AR, and CHZ will have their collateral ratios modified across various rank floors and caps. For example, ZEC's collateral ratio will range from 10% to 80% depending on the rank floor and cap. RUNE's collateral ratio will vary from 10% to 100%, while A, LUNC, AR, and CHZ will see ratios between 10% and 100%. Additionally, Binance Futures will update leverage and margin tiers for several USD-M Perpetual Contracts, including CHILLGUYUSDT, FLOCKUSDT, FIDAUSDT, NEWTUSDT, INITUSDT, KAVAUSDT, ZKCUSDT, COSUSDT, 1000000BOBUSDT, BIDUSDT, DEGOUSDT, KDAUSDT, LIGHTUSDT, EVAAUSDT, CLOUSDT, and KGENUSDT. These updates will affect existing positions and may lead to the expiration of futures running grids. Users are advised to adjust their positions accordingly to avoid potential liquidation or losses due to changes in collateral ratios and leverage tiers.

data.title: A whale transferred about 20,000 ETH to Binance, facing a $15.4 million loss after holding the coins for two months.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens, a whale deposited 19,929 ETH (worth $78.29 million) into Binance after holding it for two months, facing a $15.4 million loss. The whale initially withdrew 22,177 ETH, worth $101.95 million, from Binance and Bybit.

data.title: A certain address spent $1.2 million to buy 4,794 GIGGLE coins after Binance launched GIGGLE spot trading, and currently has a floating profit of $48,000.
data.description: According to on-chain analyst Ai Yi, an address (0x279...1688) purchased 4,794.46 GIGGLE tokens at an average price of $251.17 17 minutes after Binance announced the GIGGLE spot listing, spending a total of approximately $1.2 million and becoming one of the top 20 GIGGLE holdings. This address currently has a floating profit of $48,000 and has not yet sold any GIGGLE tokens.

data.title: Common (COMMON) will be listed on Binance Alpha and Futures
data.description: According to an official announcement, Binance will open COMMON trading on Binance Alpha at 8:00 PM (UTC) on October 27, 2025, and will also launch COMMONUSDT perpetual contracts (50x leverage) at 8:30 PM (UTC) on the same day. Binance will also airdrop COMMON tokens to eligible users, who can claim them using Binance Alpha Points between 8:00 PM (UTC) on October 27, 2025, and 8:00 PM (UTC) on October 28, 2025. (This newsletter was generated with AI assistance.)

data.title: Analyst: On-chain data shows that Bitcoin selling pressure is weakening and the market is buying on dips
data.description: CryptoQuant analyst Axel posted on social media that the proportion of Bitcoin's supply in a profitable state (30-day change) has rebounded from -12% to -6%, indicating that selling pressure is easing and the market is buying on dips. Although the current proportion of profitable coins is still lower than the level of one month ago, the decline has narrowed significantly, indicating that negative momentum is weakening.

data.title: Bitdeer's Bitcoin Holdings Increase Amid Mining and Sales Activity
data.description: According to PANews, Bitcoin mining company Bitdeer announced that as of October 24, its Bitcoin holdings have risen to 2,180.2 BTC, excluding customer deposits. This week, the company mined 123.4 BTC and sold 70 BTC, resulting in a net increase of 53.4 BTC.

data.title: AMINA Bank and Tokeny Collaborate on Regulated Digital Securities Platform
data.description: According to PANews, Swiss cryptocurrency bank AMINA Bank has partnered with Luxembourg-based tokenization company Tokeny to offer a regulated channel for digital securities issuance. This collaboration integrates AMINA's bank-grade custody and settlement services with Tokeny's ERC-3643-based issuance stack. The aim is to create a unified platform that manages both primary issuance and qualified custody. Under the framework regulated by the Swiss Financial Market Supervisory Authority (FINMA), the bank holds investor funds and oversees accounts, while smart contracts execute on-chain eligibility checks and transfer rules. The two companies claim that by eliminating custom integrations and reducing manual checks, the time for institutional issuers to go public can be reduced from several months to a few weeks.

data.title: World Liberty Financial Expands USD1 Supply by 300 Million
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Lookonchain monitoring has revealed that World Liberty Financial increased its USD1 supply by 300 million tokens 13 hours ago.

data.title: Swiss crypto bank AMINA partners with Tokeny to launch compliant digital securities issuance platform
data.description: According to Financefeeds, Swiss cryptocurrency bank AMINA Bank has partnered with Luxembourg-based tokenization firm Tokeny to provide a regulated channel for the issuance of digital securities. The partnership connects AMINA's bank-grade custody and settlement with Tokeny's ERC-3643-based issuance stack. The goal is to create a single platform that handles both primary issuance and qualified custody. The bank holds investor funds and oversees accounts within the Swiss Financial Market Supervisory Authority (FINMA) regulatory framework, while smart contracts enforce eligibility and transfer rules on-chain. The two companies claim this can reduce institutional issuers' time to market from months to weeks by eliminating custom integrations and reducing manual checks.

data.title: CZ: Those who attacked me were once SBF supporters
data.description: CZ posted on the X platform that those who attacked him were once supporters of SBF, such as Gary Gensler, Elizabeth Warren, etc.

data.title: Momentum HODL Yield Phase 2 Launched on October 25th
data.description: Phase 2 of the HODL Yield Campaign for Momentum, the Sui ecosystem's DEX, launched at 10:00 AM Beijing Time on October 25, 2025, and will run until 9:59 AM Beijing Time on November 15. All users who provided liquidity in designated pools before the campaign began, including Phase 1 users, are eligible to participate. Rewards: Phase 1 participants will receive up to a 200% APR boost in the first week, followed by a 120% boost thereafter; new users will receive a 110% APR boost. Supported pools include SUI–USDC, xSUI–SUI, suiUSDT–USDC, xBTC–wBTC, and LBTC–wBTC. Rewards will be distributed in USDC within 14 days of the campaign's conclusion, calculated based on maintained liquidity and the pool's dynamic APR.

data.title: WLFI minted 300 million USD1 in the early morning of this morning
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, World Liberty Financial issued an additional 300 million USD1 13 hours ago.

data.title: Bitcoin's Supply Profitability Shows Signs of Recovery
data.description: According to BlockBeats, CryptoQuant analyst Axel shared insights on social media regarding Bitcoin's supply profitability. The percentage of Bitcoin supply in a profitable state, measured over a 30-day change, has improved from -12% to -6%. This indicates a reduction in selling pressure and suggests that the market is engaging in buying during price dips. Although the current proportion of profitable coins remains lower than a month ago, the rate of decline has significantly narrowed, signaling a weakening of negative momentum.
